title: How It Works
subtitle: Three simple steps from first chat to live website.

step1.title: We have a free call
step1.description: You tell me about your business. I ask the right questions. No commitment, no jargon.

step2.title: I design and build it
step2.description: You see the design first. We agree on it. Then I write the code.

step3.title: You launch - and you own it
step3.description: The site goes live. You get the code, the domain, everything. It's yours.
